description: Hark llamadart quantization benchmark — slot-filling gold set. 15 cases across parameter types found in the real-examples OACP manifests: single-string, multi-string, integer-with-range, optional-field handling, and implicit-null cases. Used to verify that a quantized Qwen3 0.6B still produces valid JSON and correct parameter values for the slot-filling task.

wikipedia.search_articles.description: Open Wikipedia search results for a topic, phrase, or article name.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search text to run in Wikipedia.

wikipedia.open_article.description: Open a specific Wikipedia article by exact title.

parameters.name: article_title
parameters.description: The exact title of the Wikipedia article to open.

parameters.name: language_code
parameters.description: Two-letter language code (e.g. 'en', 'es', 'fr'). Defaults to English if not specified.

archivetune.play_music.description: Start music playback in ArchiveTune. Optionally filter by a search query or artist.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: A song, album, or search phrase to play.

parameters.name: artist
parameters.description: An artist name to filter by.

binaryeye.create_barcode.description: Generate a new barcode or QR code with the given content.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: The text, URL, or data to encode in the barcode.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The barcode format. Defaults to QR_CODE.

breezyweather.check_forecast.description: Show the weather forecast for the coming days at a location.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: City name or location to forecast for. Defaults to current location.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to include in the forecast. Defaults to 3.

librecamera.take_photo_rear_camera.description: Take a photo with the rear camera, optionally with a self-timer delay.

parameters.name: duration_seconds
parameters.description: Self-timer delay in seconds before the photo is taken. Defaults to 0 (no timer).

librecamera.take_photo_front_camera.description: Take a selfie with the front camera, optionally with a self-timer delay.

parameters.name: duration_seconds
parameters.description: Self-timer delay in seconds before the selfie is taken.

cases.utterance: look up black holes on Wikipedia
open the Wikipedia article for Kyoto
open the Kyoto article in Japanese Wikipedia
create a QR code for https://example.com
make a QR code that says hello world
show me the 7-day forecast for Tokyo
forecast for tomorrow in San Francisco
what's the weather going to be like in Paris
